25:1:1.m: He is exalted, He is full of blessings (refers to Allah)

25:1:2.m: the one who (sent down the Criterion)

25:1:4.m: the criterion (object of نَزَّلَ - sent down)

25:2:1.m: the one who (describes the owner of مُلْكُ)

25:2:8.m: a child/offspring (object of يَتَّخِذْ - did not take)

25:2:10.m: he will be (after لَمْ which negates past)

25:2:12.m: a partner (in relation to لَهُۥ - for Him)

25:3:5.m: not at all (negates يَخْلُقُونَ - they create)

25:3:7.m: a thing (object of يَخْلُقُونَ - they create)

25:3:13.m: intense harm (as the object being acted upon)

25:3:15.m: any benefit (object of يَمْلِكُونَ - they possess)

25:4:9.m: and he helped him (referring to the Quran that was mentioned before)

25:4:11.m: a people/group (helping other people do wrong against the Prophet ﷺ)

25:5:3.m: the first ones/the ancient ones (object of أَسٰطِيرُ)

25:5:4.m: he wrote it down for himself (referring to أَسٰطِيرُ - tales)

25:5:6.m: it is being dictated (object of اكْتَتَبَهَا)

25:6:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell what follows)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell what follows)

25:6:3.m: the one who (connects to يَعْلَمُ - knows)

25:6:12.m: Most Merciful (as a description of كَانَ)

25:7:3.m: this (pointing to something) (subject of يَأْكُلُ - he eats)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to something) (subject of يَأْكُلُ - he eats)

25:7:7.m: and he walks/is walking (connected to يَأْكُلُ - he eats)

25:7:9.m: in the markets (object of يَمْشِى فِى)

25:7:12.m: to him (connected to أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

25:7:14.m: so/then he should be (result of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

25:8:4.m: a treasure (any treasure, not a specific one)

25:8:9.m: he eats (from the garden mentioned in تَكُونُ لَهُۥ جَنَّةٌ)

25:8:12.m: the people who wrong others (the speakers in this verse)

25:8:16.m: a man (object of تَتَّبِعُونَ - you follow)

25:9:1.m: look! (command to one person) at كَيْفَ (how)

25:9:5.m: the examples (as the object of ضَرَبُوا - they coined)

25:9:6.m: so they went far astray (after ضَرَبُوا۟)

25:10:1.m: He is supremely blessed (referring to Allah)

25:10:2.m: the one who (connects جَعَلَ with what comes before)

25:10:5.m: he made/set (referring to Allah in this ayah)

25:10:7.m: better (as a description of what Allah can give)

ًا: (as a description of what Allah can give)

25:10:15.m: and he makes/will make (for you palaces)

25:10:17.m: palaces (as the object of جَعَلَ - He will make)

ًۢا: (as the object of جَعَلَ - He will make)

25:11:3.m: in/with the Hour (object of كَذَّبَ - they denied)

25:11:4.m: and we made ready (for those who denied the Hour)

25:11:8.m: a blazing fire (object of أَعْتَدْنَا - we have prepared)

25:12:7.m: for her/it (referring to Hell in this ayah)

25:12:8.m: with furious rage (describing سَمِعُوا - they heard)

25:13:4.m: a place (that they were thrown into)

25:14:4.m: destruction (as the thing being called for in وَٱدْعُوا۟)

25:15:8.m: was promised (by someone to المُتَّقُونَ - those who fear Allah)

25:15:13.m: and a final destination (connected to جَزَآءً)

25:16:8.m: your Lord (possessed by you, after عَلَىٰ)

25:17:5.m: from (connecting what they worship to besides)

25:17:12.m: these ones (referring to false gods being asked about)

25:18:2.m: Your glory! (addressing Allah in قَالُوا۟ they said)

25:18:14.m: you indeed provided them much enjoyment

25:18:16.m: until/up to (end point of مَّتَّعْتَهُمْ - You gave them enjoyment)

25:18:18.m: the remembrance (object of نَسُوا۟ - they forgot)

25:18:20.m: a people (object of كَانُوا - they were)

25:19:5.m: then what/so what (connects to كَذَّبُوكُم - they have denied you)

25:19:9.m: any help (as something they cannot do)

25:19:14.m: a punishment (that will be given to them)

25:20:2.m: we sent forth (connected to قَبْلَكَ - before you)

25:20:8.m: they surely eat (referring to the messengers mentioned in إِنَّهُمْ)

25:20:14.m: some of you (object of جَعَلْنَا - We made)

25:20:19.m: your Lord (as the doer of كَانَ)

25:21:12.m: our Lord (being called upon by those who reject faith)

25:22:3.m: the angels (as object of يَرَوْنَ - they see)

25:22:7.m: for the criminals (receiving no glad tidings)

25:22:9.m: a forbidden thing (object of يَقُولُونَ - they say)

25:23:6.m: a work/deed/action (possessed by something mentioned after)

25:23:7.m: and so we made it (into scattered dust)

25:24:5.m: a place of settling (object of خَيْرٌ - better)

25:24:7.m: a place of midday rest (object of خَيْرٌ and أَحْسَنُ)

25:25:1.m: and on the Day (object of تَشَقَّقُ)

25:25:5.m: and was sent down repeatedly (connected to تَشَقَّقُ - splits apart)

25:25:7.m: a sending down (as a direct object)

ُ: (subject of this part of the ayah)

25:26:9.m: difficult (describing the day for the disbelievers)

25:27:6.m: he says (describing what الظَّالِمُ/the wrongdoer does)

لَمْ: not (changes يَتَّخِذْ from present to past)

25:29:5.m: after (refers to time after ٱلذِّكْرِ - the reminder/message)

25:31:4.m: a prophet (object of لِكُلِّ - for every)

25:31:9.m: by your Lord (used as an oath)

25:31:11.m: and a supporter/defender (connected to كَفَىٰ - sufficient)

25:32:9.m: one/single (feminine, as a description of القرءان)

25:32:11.m: so that we may make firm

25:32:14.m: and we arranged it distinctly (referring to القُرْءَانُ)

25:35:5.m: and we made (something into something else)

25:40:16.m: resurrection (as the object being hoped for)

25:45:10.m: he would surely have made it (referring to الظِّلَّ - the shadow)

25:46:3.m: to/towards us (object of قَبَضْنٰهُ/we drew it)

25:47:3.m: he made (subject of the sentence about night)

25:47:8.m: as a deep rest (object of جَعَلَ - He made)

ًا: (describing وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ - and your Lord is/was)

25:61:8.m: in it (feminine, referring to السَّمَآءِ/the sky)

لَ: (subject of the sentence about day and night)

25:62:10.m: he remembers/receives reminding (in أَن يَذَّكَّرَ - that he remember)

25:63:11.m: they said (referring to the servants of the Most Merciful mentioned earlier)

25:64:4.m: prostrating (describing their state while spending the night in worship)

25:65:3.m: Our Lord (subject of يَقُولُونَ - they say)

25:66:3.m: a place of settling (describing جَهَنَّمَ - Hell)

25:66:4.m: and a place of staying (object of سَآءَتْ)

25:70:16.m: one who shows constant mercy (in object form)

25:71:5.m: then indeed he (the one who repents)
